ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "start_of_poss" TEXT /* Description of the type of possession start */,
  "percent_of_initial_attempts" REAL /* Percentage of initial attempts */,
  "e_fg_percent" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "percent_shots_at_rim" REAL /* Percentage of shots taken at the rim */,
  "fg_percent_at_rim" REAL /* Field goal percentage at the rim */,
  "percent_shots_2pt_jumpers" REAL /* Percentage of shots from 2-point jumpers */,
  "fg_percent_2pt_jumpers" REAL /* Field goal percentage for 2-point jumpers */,
  "percent_shots_3pt" REAL /* Percentage of shots from 3-point range */,
  "fg_percent_3pt" REAL /* Field goal percentage for 3-point shots */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the recorded metrics */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the team associated with the metrics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the player */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicator whether the game was played at home or away */,
  "win_loss" TEXT /* Indicator whether the team won or lost the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_logs ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., NBA) */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_city" TEXT /* Home city of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2011-12) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular, playoffs, championship) */,
  "number_of_games" INTEGER /* Number of games played during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the team the player is associated with */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays (e.g., Guard, Forward) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "average_minutes_played" REAL /* Average minutes played per game */,
  "average_points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "average_rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "average_assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "coaching_style" TEXT /* Coaching style */,
  "favorite_formation" TEXT /* Favorite formation or strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the team playing */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the opposing team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "officials" TEXT /* Names of the referees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds secured by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "field_goal_attempts" INTEGER /* Field goal attempts made by the player */,
  "three_point_attempts" INTEGER /* Three-point attempts made by the player */,
  "free_throw_attempts" INTEGER /* Free throw attempts made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_logs ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "query_string" TEXT /* Query string or parameters used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES analytics_users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)
